channel.title: SSbreakingHeadlines
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SSbreakingHeadlines, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: WATCH: World Cup History in the Making
item.description: The U.S. men's national team, called the 'golden generation,' advances alongside Egypt and Ivory Coast to the knockout round for the first...

item.title: Dangerous heat wave affecting large parts of the U.S. this week
item.description: A heat wave will impact a large portion of the U.S. this week. The National Weather Service warns that high humidity will make temperatures feel even hotter.

item.title: Three firefighters killed, two injured while battling wildfires near Colorado-Utah border
item.description: The U.S. Wildland Fire Service reported that the firefighters were part of a multi-agency response to the Knowles and Gore fires near the Colorado-Utah border.

item.title: Three firefighters killed, two injured while fighting wildfires on the Colorado-Utah border
